match_summary: The candidate has strong evidence for Python API work, retrieval-oriented AI workflows, and a portfolio project that demonstrates deterministic agent orchestration.

resume_bullets.text: Built a Python FastAPI workflow for evidence-grounded career analysis, including document chunking, retrieval, match scoring, and grounding evaluation.
Created a GitHub portfolio project demonstrating LangGraph-style orchestration for parsing materials, retrieving evidence, and flagging unsupported claims.

cover_letter.opening: I am excited to apply for this AI application engineer role.
body: My project work aligns with your need for Python APIs and evidence-grounded AI workflows.
I have built retrieval and evaluation components that keep generated career content tied to user-provided evidence.

interview_prep.why_it_matters: The role asks for Python APIs, retrieval, and deterministic AI workflow orchestration.
interview_prep.prep_suggestion: Prepare a concise walkthrough of the FastAPI endpoint, retrieval service, writer, evaluator, and LangGraph workflow.
